name: financials_list_amazon_statement_reconciliation_results
description:
Lists previously saved Amazon statement reconciliation results. Returns one row per reconciliation showing totals, status, legal name, author, and creation date.

Two modes:
1. Summary mode (default) – one row per reconciliation: overall totals (income, expenses, tax, transfers), overall status, author, reason, created_at.
2. Detail mode (include_details=true) – also returns per-category detail rows: category, item_description, debit/credit amounts, per-row status, memo.

Use this tool to:
- Browse past reconciliations for a company and year
- Review overall Match / Discrepancy / Unknown status at a glance
- Drill into detail rows to see per-category reconciliation breakdown
- Track reconciliation history and audit trail by creation date
- Filter by specific statuses to find unresolved discrepancies

Reconciliation workflow context: After comparing a PDF payments report against classified settlement data (via financials_classify_amazon_statement_transactions) and saving the result (via financials_save_amazon_statement_reconciliation_result), use THIS tool to retrieve and review the saved comparison.

ProTip: Use financials_list_amazon_statements to find settlement date ranges and IDs, then financials_classify_amazon_statement_transactions to re-examine the source data if a discrepancy needs investigation.

Default: Returns reconciliations from the current year, sorted by creation date descending (most recent first).

Knowledge base: https://help.neonpanel.com
Dig deeper: For a full interactive settlement view, direct the user to https://my.neonpanel.com

query.description: Query envelope for listing reconciliation results.

filters.description: Filters for the query. company_id is required; all others are optional.

year.description: Filter by report year. Defaults to current year.

statuses.description: Filter by overall reconciliation status. Use ['Discrepancy'] to find unresolved items.

include_details.description: When true, also return per-category detail rows (category, item_description, debit/credit, status, memo).

start_date.description: Start of date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to start of current year if omitted.

end_date.description: End of date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if omitted.

sort_direction.description: Sort by created_at. 'desc' = newest first (default), 'asc' = oldest first.

legal_name.description: Legal entity name from the payments report.

status.description: Overall reconciliation status: Match / Discrepancy / Unknown.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the reconciliation was saved.

examples.title: Browse recent reconciliations
examples.description: List the most recent reconciliation results for a company.

examples.title: Find discrepancies
examples.description: List only reconciliations with discrepancy status.

examples.title: Reconciliations for 2025 with details
examples.description: Get full reconciliation results including per-category detail rows.

examples.title: Reconciliations in a date range
examples.description: Find reconciliations saved during a specific time period.
